channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [CLEANMAX] Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd to Sell Shares in Subsidiary to Web Werks India Private Limited
item.description:
Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd has executed a Share Purchase Agreement to sell its shares in its wholly owned subsidiary, Clean Max Andes Private Limited, to Web Werks India Private Limited. The agreement was entered into on 10 March 2026. The turnover of Clean Max Andes Private Limited for FY 2024-25 is Nil and it has a net worth of INR -1,25,612.04 as of 31 March 2025. The expected date of completion of the sale is on or before 31 March 2026. The buyer, Web Werks India Private Limited, does not belong to the promoter/promoter group/group companies. The transaction is not a related party transaction and is not done under a Scheme of Arrangement.

  • Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd to sell shares in its subsidiary, Clean Max Andes Private Limited.
  • The buyer is Web Werks India Private Limited.
  • The agreement was entered into on 10 March 2026.
  • Clean Max Andes Private Limited had a net worth of INR -1,25,612.04 as of 31 March 2025.
  • The sale is expected to be completed by 31 March 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [3IINFOTECH] 3i Infotech Ltd Wins 3-Year, Rs. 5.66 Crores Managed IT Services Contract
item.description:
3i Infotech Limited has received an order from a prominent Indian engineering and industrial solutions company for providing Managed IT Services across multiple locations. The engagement, valued at approximately Rs. 5.66 crores, involves providing IT Managed Services and onsite technical support resources across various locations covering workplace services, application development support, infrastructure administration and enterprise IT operations. The contract is expected to be executed under a Managed Services model with defined SLAs.

  • 3i Infotech wins a 3-year Managed IT Services contract worth approximately Rs. 5.66 crores
  • The contract involves providing IT Managed Services and onsite technical support across multiple locations
  • The engagement is expected to improve service continuity, operational efficiency and adherence to defined service-level agreements
  • The contract is to be executed under a Managed Services model with defined SLAs
  • The customer is a prominent Indian engineering and industrial solutions company specializing in power and industrial equipment

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: 3I INFOTECH LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [THEMISMED] Themis Medicare Ltd Revises Preferential Issue Price to Rs. 102.87 for Vividhmargi Investments Private Limited
item.description:
Themis Medicare Ltd has revised the issue price from Rs. 100 to Rs. 102.87 per Convertible Equity Warrant for Vividhmargi Investments Private Limited. This decision was made by the Preferential Issue Committee at its meeting held on 10th March, 2026. The Committee also adopted the modified Pricing Certificate issued by Mr. Abhishek Wagh, Practicing Company Secretaries. The total number of securities proposed to be issued is up to 4.99% of total shareholding equivalent to 45,95,795 equity shares. The issue price is Rs. 102.87 per Convertible Equity Warrant.

  • Themis Medicare Ltd revises the issue price for Vividhmargi Investments Private Limited
  • Revised issue price is Rs. 102.87 per Convertible Equity Warrant
  • Themis Medicare Ltd to issue up to 4.99% of total shareholding equivalent to 45,95,795 equity shares
  • The decision was made at the meeting held on 10th March, 2026
  • Themis Medicare Ltd adopts the modified Pricing Certificate issued by Mr. Abhishek Wagh, Practicing Company Secretaries

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: THEMIS MEDICARE LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [PUNJLLOYD] Adani Infra Completes Acquisition of Punj Lloyd's Defence Unit and Shares in Air Works India
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Adani Infra (India) Limited (AIIL) has completed the acquisition of Punj Lloyd Limited’s Defence Unit as per the Business Transfer Agreement (BTA) and Punj Lloyd Aviation Limited's shares in Air Works India (Engineering) Private Limited as per the Share Purchase Agreement (SPA). The Closing Date for both transactions occurred on the same day. The Defence Unit of Punj Lloyd Limited now stands transferred to Adani Defence Systems and Technologies Limited (ADSTL) and the shares of Air Works India (Engineering) Private Limited held by Punj Lloyd Aviation Limited are being processed for transfer to ADSTL.

  • Adani Infra (India) Limited has completed the acquisition of Punj Lloyd Limited’s Defence Unit and Punj Lloyd Aviation Limited's shares in Air Works India (Engineering) Private Limited.
  • The acquisition was carried out as per the Business Transfer Agreement (BTA) and Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) respectively.
  • The Defence Unit of Punj Lloyd Limited has been transferred to Adani Defence Systems and Technologies Limited (ADSTL).
  • The shares of Air Works India (Engineering) Private Limited held by Punj Lloyd Aviation Limited are being processed for transfer to ADSTL.
  • The Closing Date for both transactions occurred on the same day.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Punj Lloyd Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PUNJLLOYD] Punj Lloyd Ltd Acquired by Adani Infra (India) Limited for INR 281.10 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

In accordance with Regulation 30 of Securities and Exchange Board of India Regulations, 2015 (LODR) and Schedule III of LODR, Punj Lloyd Ltd has been acquired by Adani Infra (India) Limited for a total sale consideration of INR 281.10 crores. The acquisition was made on a going concern basis pursuant to the liquidation process of the Company under the provisions of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 and the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India (Liquidation Process) Regulations, 2016, and the order of the National Company Law Tribunal, Principal Bench, New Delhi dated February 12, 2026. The Successful Bidder has also executed undertakings to assume liability against the underlying bank guarantees.

  • Punj Lloyd Ltd acquired by Adani Infra (India) Limited
  • Total sale consideration of INR 281.10 crores
  • Acquisition made on a going concern basis
  • Pursuant to the liquidation process under Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016
  • Successful Bidder executed undertakings to assume liability against bank guarantees

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Punj Lloyd Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [ARIHANT] Arihant Foundations Issues Corporate Guarantee for Canopy Living LLP's Term Loan Facility
item.description:
Arihant Foundations & Housing Ltd. has approved the issuance of a Corporate Guarantee towards the Term Loan Facility being availed by Canopy Living LLP, a joint venture of the Company. The guarantee is for up to INR 250 crores. The promoter/ promoter group do not have any interest in this transaction, and the guarantee has been provided on an arm’s length basis. The corporate guarantee is a contingent liability for the Company, but at this point, there is no impact of this guarantee on the Company.

  • Arihant Foundations to issue Corporate Guarantee for Canopy Living LLP's Term Loan Facility
  • Guarantee amount is up to INR 250 crores
  • No interest from promoter/ promoter group in the transaction
  • Guarantee provided on an arm’s length basis
  • No immediate impact of the guarantee on the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ARIHANT FOUNDATIONS & HOUSING LTD.-$ | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [RELIANCE] Reliance Industries Boosts LPG Production Amid Global Energy Volatility
item.description:
Reliance Industries is taking proactive steps to maximize LPG production from its refining and petrochemicals complexes at Jamnagar, the world’s largest integrated refining hub. The company is working around the clock to optimize refinery operations and enhance LPG output to ensure stable and reliable supplies to the domestic market. Natural gas produced from the KG-D6 Basin will be diverted to support supply to priority sectors, in line with national energy priorities and Government guidelines. Reliance remains committed to supporting India’s energy security and ensuring reliable access to essential fuels for the country.

  • Reliance Industries boosts LPG production amid global energy volatility
  • Company optimizes refinery operations to enhance LPG output
  • Natural gas from KG-D6 Basin diverted to support priority sectors
  • Reliance committed to supporting India’s energy security
  • Company ensures reliable access to essential fuels for the country

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIANCE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [ENBETRD] Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd Re-Appoints Mr Akash Shailesh Gangar as Non-Executive Independent Director
item.description:
Enbee Trade & Finance Ltd announced the re-appointment of Mr Akash Shailesh Gangar as a Non-Executive Independent Director. The re-appointment will take effect from March 11, 2026. Mr Gangar is a qualified Information Technology engineer with strong entrepreneurial acumen and hands-on leadership experience. He brings valuable insights into business operations, strategic growth, and market dynamics. The appointment is subject to the approval of shareholders at the ensuing Annual General Meeting. The company also announced the cessation of Mr Jayesh Gulabbhai Patel as a Non-Executive Independent Director with effect from close of business hours on 10th March, 2026.

  • Re-appointment of Mr Akash Shailesh Gangar as Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Appointment term of 5 years commencing from March 11, 2026
  • Cessation of Mr Jayesh Gulabbhai Patel as a Non-Executive Independent Director
  • Subject to approval of shareholders at the Annual General Meeting
  • Mr Gangar's profile: Qualified Information Technology engineer with strong entrepreneurial acumen

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ENBEE TRADE & FINANCE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HEROMOTOCO] Hero MotoCorp Withholds Dividend Payments Due to Electronic Rejection
item.description:
Hero MotoCorp Ltd. has withheld dividend payments for certain shareholders due to electronic rejection by the banking system. The affected shareholders received a letter notifying them about the issue. The company is required to remit dividends electronically as per the amendments in SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. Shareholders are requested to update their valid bank account details with their Depository Participant or the Company's RTA to receive the withheld dividends.

  • Hero MotoCorp has withheld dividend payments for certain shareholders due to electronic rejection by the banking system.
  • Affected shareholders have received a letter notifying them about the issue.
  • The company is required to remit dividends electronically as per SEBI regulations.
  • Shareholders are requested to update their valid bank account details to receive the withheld dividends.
  • This development highlights the importance of maintaining accurate bank account details and the potential risks associated with physical shares.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HERO MOTOCORP LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [ADVENTHTL] Advent Hotels International Ltd Attends Investor Session at Arihant Capital Bharat Connect Conference
item.description:
Advent Hotels International Ltd announced that its representative attended an investor session at the Arihant Capital Bharat Connect Conference: Rising Stars on Tuesday, March 10, 2026. The meeting, originally scheduled for Wednesday, March 11, 2026, was held at 11:00 AM IST through VC mode, Group meeting. The company did not disclose any Unpublished Price Sensitive Information (UPSI) at this meeting.

  • Advent Hotels International Ltd participated in an investor session at Arihant Capital Bharat Connect Conference: Rising Stars
  • The meeting was held on Tuesday, March 10, 2026, instead of the originally scheduled date
  • The meeting was conducted through VC mode, Group meeting
  • No Unpublished Price Sensitive Information (UPSI) was disclosed at the meeting

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Advent Hotels International Ltd | Category: Business Update
